exercises.sentence: Yo no _______ lo que dice ese hombre.
exercises.translation: I do not believe what that man says.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ que va a llover hoy.
exercises.translation: I believe that it is going to rain today.

exercises.sentence: A veces _______ que es mejor descansar.
exercises.translation: Sometimes I believe that it is better to rest.

exercises.sentence: ¿Tú _______ en los fantasmas?
exercises.translation: Do you believe in ghosts?

exercises.sentence: Sé que tú _______ lo que te digo.
exercises.translation: I know that you believe what I tell you.

exercises.sentence: ¿Por qué no _______ en su historia?
exercises.translation: Why don't you believe in his story?

exercises.sentence: Ella _______ que es la mejor opción.
exercises.translation: She believes it is the best option.

exercises.sentence: Él _______ todo lo que le cuentan sus amigos.
exercises.translation: He believes everything his friends tell him.

exercises.sentence: Mi abuela _______ que la honestidad es importante.
exercises.translation: My grandmother believes that honesty is important.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros _______ que podemos ganar el partido.
exercises.translation: We believe that we can win the game.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros no _______ en esos rumores falsos.
exercises.translation: We do not believe in those false rumors.

exercises.sentence: Siempre _______ que el trabajo duro tiene recompensa.
exercises.translation: We always believe that hard work has a reward.

exercises.sentence: Ellos _______ que la película termina pronto.
exercises.translation: They believe that the movie ends soon.

exercises.sentence: Mis padres _______ que debemos estudiar más.
exercises.translation: My parents believe that we should study more.

exercises.sentence: Ellas _______ firmemente en la justicia.
exercises.translation: They firmly believe in justice.

exercises.sentence: Ayer yo _______ que era lunes.
exercises.translation: Yesterday I believed it was Monday.

exercises.sentence: Por un momento yo _______ que estabas en casa.
exercises.translation: For a moment I believed that you were home.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ que la reunión era a las cinco.
exercises.translation: I believed the meeting was at five.

exercises.sentence: ¿Tú _______ que la noticia era real?
exercises.translation: Did you believe that the news was real?

exercises.sentence: Al principio tú _______ que era una broma.
exercises.translation: At first you believed it was a joke.

exercises.sentence: ¿Por qué _______ que él te mentía?
exercises.translation: Why did you believe that he was lying to you?

exercises.sentence: Él _______ que nadie lo estaba mirando.
exercises.translation: He believed that nobody was watching him.

exercises.sentence: Ella _______ todo lo que dijo el vendedor.
exercises.translation: She believed everything the salesman said.

exercises.sentence: El niño _______ que el regalo era para él.
exercises.translation: The boy believed the gift was for him.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros _______ que la fiesta terminaba tarde.
exercises.translation: We believed that the party ended late.

exercises.sentence: Al final, nosotros _______ que era una buena idea.
exercises.translation: In the end, we believed it was a good idea.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros _______ que el examen sería más difícil.
exercises.translation: We believed the exam would be more difficult.

exercises.sentence: Ellos _______ que habíamos llegado a tiempo.
exercises.translation: They believed that we had arrived on time.

exercises.sentence: Mis amigos _______ que la tienda estaba cerrada.
exercises.translation: My friends believed that the store was closed.

exercises.sentence: Ellas _______ en su plan hasta el final.
exercises.translation: They believed in his plan until the end.

exercises.sentence: Antes yo _______ que viajar era caro.
exercises.translation: Before, I believed that traveling was expensive.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ que vivías en España.
exercises.translation: I believed that you lived in Spain.

exercises.sentence: De niño yo _______ en los cuentos de hadas.
exercises.translation: As a child I believed in fairy tales.

exercises.sentence: ¿Tú _______ que esa calle era segura?
exercises.translation: Did you believe that street was safe?

exercises.sentence: Siempre _______ que tenías razón.
exercises.translation: You always believed that you were right.

exercises.sentence: Cuando eras pequeño, ¿_______ en los superhéroes?
exercises.translation: When you were small, did you believe in superheroes?

exercises.sentence: Ella _______ que la prueba era ayer.
exercises.translation: She believed that the test was yesterday.

exercises.sentence: Él _______ que todos sus amigos vendrían.
exercises.translation: He believed that all his friends would come.

exercises.sentence: Mi hermano _______ que el invierno duraría meses.
exercises.translation: My brother believed that winter would last months.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros _______ que la reunión empezaba a las diez.
exercises.translation: We believed that the meeting started at ten.

exercises.sentence: Siempre _______ que ellos volverían pronto.
exercises.translation: We always believed that they would come back soon.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros _______ que éramos los mejores amigos.
exercises.translation: We believed that we were best friends.

exercises.sentence: Ellos _______ que todo iba a salir bien.
exercises.translation: They believed that everything was going to go well.

exercises.sentence: Mis abuelos _______ que el mundo era diferente antes.
exercises.translation: My grandparents believed that the world was different before.

exercises.sentence: Ellas _______ que tenían suficiente dinero.
exercises.translation: They believed that they had enough money.

exercises.sentence: Yo no _______ esa noticia aunque me lo digas.
exercises.translation: I would not believe that news even if you told me.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ que es mejor esperar un poco.
exercises.translation: I would believe that it is better to wait a bit.

exercises.sentence: ¿Tú qué _______ si estuvieras en mi lugar?
exercises.translation: What would you believe if you were in my place?

exercises.sentence: Tú no _______ lo difícil que es sin ayuda.
exercises.translation: You would not believe how difficult it is without help.

exercises.sentence: ¿_______ que él dice la verdad si lo conocieras?
exercises.translation: Would you believe that he tells the truth if you knew him?

exercises.sentence: Él _______ en tu historia si tuvieras pruebas.
exercises.translation: He would believe in your story if you had proof.

exercises.sentence: Ella _______ que es necesario cambiar el plan.
exercises.translation: She would believe that it is necessary to change the plan.

exercises.sentence: Cualquiera _______ que es un experto por cómo habla.
exercises.translation: Anyone would believe he is an expert by how he talks.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros _______ que es posible si trabajamos juntos.
exercises.translation: We would believe that it is possible if we work together.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros _______ en tu inocencia siempre.
exercises.translation: We would always believe in your innocence.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros _______ que este proyecto será un éxito.
exercises.translation: We would believe that this project will be a success.

exercises.sentence: Ellos _______ que es una broma si no ven fotos.
exercises.translation: They would believe it is a joke if they don't see photos.

exercises.sentence: Muchos _______ en su proyecto si lo explica mejor.
exercises.translation: Many would believe in his project if he explains it better.

exercises.sentence: Mis amigos _______ que la ciudad es muy bonita.
exercises.translation: My friends would believe that the city is very pretty.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ que todo mejorará con el tiempo.
exercises.translation: I will believe that everything will improve with time.

exercises.sentence: Solo entonces yo _______ en sus promesas.
exercises.translation: Only then will I believe in his promises.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ que ese hombre es honesto hasta que mienta.
exercises.translation: I will believe that man is honest until he lies.

exercises.sentence: ¿Tú _______ que el cambio es positivo algún día?
exercises.translation: Will you believe that the change is positive one day?

exercises.sentence: Tú _______ lo que quieras, pero yo tengo fe.
exercises.translation: You will believe whatever you want, but I have faith.

exercises.sentence: ¿_______ que él vendrá a tiempo mañana?
exercises.translation: Will you believe that he will arrive on time tomorrow?

exercises.sentence: Él _______ en el proyecto cuando vea los resultados.
exercises.translation: He will believe in the project when he sees the results.

exercises.sentence: Ella _______ que el trabajo está terminado mañana.
exercises.translation: She will believe that the work is finished tomorrow.

exercises.sentence: El público _______ que la actuación fue excelente.
exercises.translation: The audience will believe that the performance was excellent.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros _______ que la situación cambiará pronto.
exercises.translation: We will believe that the situation will change soon.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros _______ en sus palabras si demuestra honestidad.
exercises.translation: We will believe in his words if he demonstrates honesty.

exercises.sentence: Nosotros _______ que este es el camino correcto.
exercises.translation: We will believe that this is the right path.

exercises.sentence: Ellos _______ que la verdad siempre sale a la luz.
exercises.translation: They will believe that the truth always comes to light.

exercises.sentence: Mis hermanos _______ que los regalos llegaron tarde.
exercises.translation: My brothers will believe that the gifts arrived late.

exercises.sentence: Todos _______ que tú hiciste un buen trabajo.
exercises.translation: Everyone will believe that you did a good job.
